THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEATH, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET #444, S.F., STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 5:00PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, THEN THE PLTF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR $ 800 IN DAMAGES, $ 83 IN COSTS AND $ 10.67 PER DAY IN U/D DAMAGES FROM JAN 15, 1997. SEE STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FILE FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
